title: React + Bento

# React + Bento

Coming soon. Same beautiful Bento design as a React Single Page Application with Vite.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Framework | React 18 + Vite |
| Language | TypeScript |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth |
| Router | React Router v6 |

## Status

🔜 In development. Star the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/FaizyabHussain07/slik-engine) to get notified.
